login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Internal login · HR · Recruiter · Super Admin
login.magicLinkSent: A sign-in link has been sent to your email
login.magicLinkSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a one-time sign-in link
login.provisioningNote: Internal accounts are pre-provisioned by Super Admin. Self-registration is not supported. Only company domain emails are allowed.
login.invalidCredentials: Sign in failed. Please try again.

candidateLogin.title: Welcome back
candidateLogin.subtitle: Sign in to continue your application.
candidateLogin.notCandidate: This account is not a candidate. Please sign in at the staff portal.
candidateLogin.resendFailed: Could not resend email. Please try again.
candidateLogin.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! We sent a verification email — please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account before signing in.
candidateLogin.heroSubtitle: Apply directly, get interviewed and objectively evaluated by AI through multiple rounds.

candidateRegister.title: Create Candidate Account
candidateRegister.subtitle: Free — takes less than 1 minute.
candidateRegister.passwordHint: Minimum 8 characters with uppercase, number, and special character.
candidateRegister.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms of service.
candidateRegister.heroTitle2: let AI find jobs for you.
candidateRegister.heroSubtitle: Register for free with your personal email and start applying today.
candidateRegister.feature1: Upload CV once, use for all positions

register.title: Create New Account
register.subtitle: Start your smart recruitment journey
register.heroSubtitle: Increase recruitment efficiency by 60% with smart AI

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email. We'll send a password reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists, you will receive a reset link within a few minutes
forgotPassword.sentMessage: We sent a password reset link to
forgotPassword.sendError: An error occurred while sending. Please try again.
forgotPassword.linkNote: Reset link is valid for 2 hours and can only be used once. If the email exists in the system, you will receive it.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new password for {{email}}
resetPassword.invalidLink: Password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.invalidLinkInfo: Link is invalid or missing information. Please request a new link.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.passwordRequireUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
resetPassword.passwordRequireNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
resetPassword.passwordRequireSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character from !@#$%^&*.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.serverError: An error occurred, please try again later.

verifyEmail.invalidLink: Verification link is invalid or missing information.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Could not resend email. Please try again.

oauthCallback.createdPending: Your account has been recorded and is waiting for administrator approval.
oauthCallback.errorDefault: OAuth login failed. Please try again.
oauthCallback.noValidInfo: No valid login information found from OAuth callback.

logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

error.weakPassword: Password is too weak, please use at least 8 characters
error.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again
